description_for_human: Find adult-friendly skate parks, local skate shops, and skating communities for people 40+ in the US, UK, Canada, and Australia.
description_for_model: Use this to find adult-friendly skateboard parks, local skate shops with knowledgeable staff, and skating community groups specifically for people aged 40 and over in English-speaking countries (US, UK, Canada, Australia). Also provides guides and advice for adults returning to skateboarding after a long break.
